channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: Your team needs a paved road before snow hits
item.description: Cut deployment time 73% and on-call incidents 67% with a paved road — the concrete steps, tools, and tradeoffs most guides miss. Includes GitHub Actions workflow, Helm chart, and Backstage setup.

item.title: AI agents overwrote my repo: how to stop them
item.description: Cut production incidents by 40% when AI agents modify code — the real constraints, semantic reviews, and load tests that caught our race conditions and memory leaks

item.title: Why 84% use AI coding tools but only 29% trust them
item.description: Cut rework from 11 days to 2 by choosing the right AI coding tool and enforcing a prompt template and review gate. Measure first-pass merge rate and edge-case coverage in two weeks, not months.

item.title: Pick the right realtime tool for your app
item.description: Cut realtime tool choice mistakes to zero with measured WebSockets vs SSE vs long polling latency, CPU, and battery data on a 2020 M1 MacBook Pro using vegeta 12.8, FastAPI 0.111, Flask 3.0, and iPhone 13 battery logging.

item.title: Africa’s latency taught me to write backend for 10ms
item.description: Cut p99 API latency from 850ms to 12ms in Africa by writing

item.title: Message queues: when to pay the price
item.description: Cut 60% of API latency by replacing message queues with REST calls — when queues help and when they waste money, with real benchmarks and failure modes.

item.title: AI agents steal your code: how to watch them
item.description: Cut review time 68% by stopping AI agents from rewriting your whole codebase. Learn the exact prompts, contracts, and sandboxes that stop agents from adding files, new deps, or regressions. Tools: Cursor, aider, Docker — benchmarks and code included.

item.title: Redis vs Memcached: what fails first?
item.description: Cut API response time by 60% with Redis or Memcached — p99 latency at 15k ops/sec, eviction rates, cold-start times, and the mistakes that cause cache stampedes.

item.title: Stop losing devs to undifferentiated work
item.description: Cut engineer time on undifferentiated work by 67% with a paved road platform — Nix, Tilt, OPA, and guardrails reduced setup time 91% and staging breaks 73%

item.title: 7 reasons monoliths beat microservices in 2026
item.description: Cut API response time by 50% and cloud costs 80% with Go monoliths — the real 2026 benchmarks, mistakes, and when to split — for teams from $200 DigitalOcean to Series B

item.title: Schedule vs cron: when the grid cleans up
item.description: Cut cloud carbon 37% by scheduling batch jobs when Kenya’s grid is cleanest — real AWS Lambda vs Granulate GCAS benchmarks, costs, and the next step to verify savings in your cluster.

item.title: 2026 salaries: AI skills that pay vs ones that don’t
item.description: Cut AI salary gaps with real data: SQL over vector embeddings delivers 12% higher pay than LLM fine-tuning — plus 60% lower query costs and 40% faster response times in 2026 benchmarks.

item.title: Integrate African payments: M-Pesa vs Flutterwave vs
item.description: Cut African payment integration time by 40%: M-Pesa 1.01% fee vs Flutterwave 3.8% vs Paystack 1.5% with real latency benchmarks and compliance costs for Kenya, Nigeria, Ghana.

item.title: No-code vs code: pick the right path first
item.description: Cut build time by 70% with the no-code vs code decision framework — measure latency, cost, and lock-in before you commit. Examples from Retool, Bubble, Next.js.

item.title: AI turns juniors into seniors overnight
item.description: Cut schema generation time by 82% with GitHub Copilot and a validation harness — bug rate drops from 3.2% to 1.0% while juniors learn faster and seniors ship more

item.title: Stop losing clients to rate limits
item.description: Cut API 429 errors from 23% to 2.1% with a leaky bucket and global counter — client retries dropped 87%, latency fell from 210ms to 85ms, and we saved $100/month on Redis costs.

item.title: Claude Code agents: we built one in 125 lines
item.description: Cut daily automation time from 30 minutes to 3 minutes with a 125-line Claude Code agent — no Docker, no Lambda, no yak shaving. Practical walkthrough with code, benchmarks, and lessons learned.

item.title: No CS degree? Build senior skills anyway
item.description: Go from junior to senior in 3-5 years without a CS degree — learn systems, not syllabi. Real examples from payments, caching, and Kubernetes under load.

item.title: Python 3.13 packaging: the only setup that worked
item.description: Cut Python packaging time by 73% and reduce Docker images by 28% with pyproject.toml, uv, and cibuildwheel — the stack teams use in 2026.

item.title: Stop polishing your GitHub profile
item.description: Reduce portfolio noise by 80% with one rule: publish latency graphs, cost data, and incident logs—examples from real AWS and DigitalOcean systems that landed $95k–$135k remote offers.
